situation: audit-2026-07-08-046 finding SP-ENG-H-003 (high): prediction-engine.js setWeights uses `typeof v !== 'number'` check which passes NaN (since typeof NaN === 'number'). The sum check `Math.abs(sum - 1.0) > 0.01` also fails to catch NaN because Math.abs(NaN) is NaN and NaN > 0.01 is false. Result: calibration can silently inject NaN weights, poisoning all downstream sunset scores with NaN composites.
action: Replace typeof-only check with `typeof v !== 'number' || !Number.isFinite(v)` in setWeights loop. Error message now includes the offending value for debuggability. Single-file route-fix, no public interface change.
outcome_evidence: Commit 7fecc57 on auto/opt-prediction-engine-1783395732; pushed to origin. Diff: +2/-1 lines in setWeights validation loop. Branch URL: https://code.alibaba-inc.com/xtool/wanxia/codereview/new?from=main&to=auto/opt-prediction-engine-1783395732

audit_findings.finding: setWeights accepts NaN/Infinity: typeof NaN === 'number' bypasses guard; Math.abs(NaN-1)>0.01 evaluates false so sum check also passes silently
audit_findings.remediation: Add Number.isFinite() check alongside typeof; throw descriptive error with offending value
